plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-628 RP20.P05.M03.S21-RP20.P05.M05.S16 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-628 covers the RP20 Data Room And VDR P05 secondary workflow and permission/audit bridge over 40 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, stable ID, replay, secondary workflow, permission/audit binding, fixture, test, Hermes evidence, and no-real-data boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.
